meta.title: kidi.ai — Learning that feels like play
meta.description: AI-powered personalized education for kids aged 4–12. Adaptive lessons, real progress, endless curiosity.
meta.keywords: AI education, kids learning, personalized learning, adaptive learning, kidi

hero.title: Learning that feels like
hero.subtitle: kidi.ai adapts to your child's unique pace and curiosity — creating a school that never feels like school.

features.title: Built for the way kids actually learn
features.subtitle: Not flashcards. Not boring videos. A living, breathing curriculum that grows with your child.

items.title: Adaptive AI Engine
items.desc: Every lesson adjusts in real-time based on what your child gets right, wrong, or skips entirely.

items.title: Game-based Learning
items.desc: Progress feels like leveling up. Kids earn rewards, unlock stories, and keep coming back on their own.

items.title: Parent Dashboard
items.desc: See exactly what your child learned today, where they're thriving, and where they need a little extra help.

items.title: Multilingual Support
items.desc: Learn in English, Turkish, and more. Great for bilingual families and international schools.

items.title: Safe & Ad-free
items.desc: No ads, no dark patterns, no social feeds. Just pure, joyful learning in a protected environment.

items.title: Instant Setup
items.desc: Ready in under 2 minutes. No app downloads required — works on any tablet, phone, or computer.

parentApp.title: Stay Connected with Your Child's Journey
parentApp.subtitle: The parent app gives you full visibility into your child's learning — progress, achievements, and insights — all in the palm of your hand.

howItWorks.title: From zero to learning in minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to unlock your child's potential.

steps.title: Create your child's profile
steps.desc: Tell us your child's age, interests, and current level. Our AI builds a personalized curriculum on the spot.

steps.title: Start the first lesson
steps.desc: Your child dives into an interactive adventure. The AI watches, adapts, and keeps things perfectly challenging.

steps.title: Watch them grow
steps.desc: Get weekly progress reports. See skills develop. Celebrate milestones together as a family.

items.quote: My son actually asks to do his lessons now. That has never happened before in his life.
items.author: Sarah M.

items.quote: We use kidi.ai for both English and Turkish. The language switching is seamless and our daughter loves it.
items.author: Mehmet K.

items.quote: The parent dashboard is incredible. I finally understand where my child is actually struggling and thriving.
items.author: Priya R.

items.q: What ages is kidi.ai designed for?
items.a: kidi.ai is built for children aged 4 to 12. The AI adapts the difficulty, visual complexity, and interaction style based on your child's age and assessed level.

items.q: Do I need to download an app?
items.a: No download required. kidi.ai works in any modern web browser — on tablets, phones, Chromebooks, and desktops. Your child's progress syncs automatically across all devices.
Absolutely. We are COPPA and GDPR compliant. We never sell data, never show ads, and store only what's needed for personalized learning.

items.q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
items.a: Yes, cancel anytime with one click. No questions, no retention flows, no hassle. Your data stays accessible for 30 days after cancellation.

items.q: How does the AI adapt to my child?
items.a: Our engine tracks 40+ signals per session — response time, error patterns, re-attempt behavior, and engagement — to keep lessons in the optimal challenge zone, always.
Yes. The Starter plan is free forever. The Family plan includes a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

footer.tagline: Making every child a curious, confident learner.
